description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named pr that triggers on push to branches matching pull-request/[0-9]+. The workflow has concurrent runs grouped by workflow and ref, cancelling in-progress jobs. It consists of multiple jobs: pr-builder, checks, conda-cpp-build, conda-cpp-tests, conda-python-build, conda-python-tests, docs-build, wheel-build, and wheel-tests. Most jobs inherit secrets and use reusable workflows from rapidsai/shared-action-workflows with specific inputs and dependencies.
